title.en: In front of him, the other swordsmen were all y...

content.en:
Giving birth to his own law of the sword is the first step, Ye Tian has already completed it, and only if there are more and more laws of his own sword, can he evolve into the origin of the law of the sword.

Before, Ye Tian was always one step away from the origin of the Law of Condensing Blades.

Now, with the help of the heart of the sword, Ye Tian has finally stepped into this step.

Rumble!!!!

A Void of Blades was born inside Ye Tian's body, and the depths of the void evolved into a Divine Knife, which was the form of the origin of the Knife.

"The origin of the law of the sword, it feels good to control the law!"

Ye Tian closed his eyes and felt that he seemed to be condensed on the law of the sword, and he could create the law of the knife with his hands, and he could easily isolate the law of the sword between heaven and earth, and form a domain that belonged to the law of the sword.

At this moment, he really knew the origin of the law of condensing the sword, and the gap between the origin of the law of the condensing knife and not having the origin of the law of the condensing knife, it was absolutely incomparably large.

If other swordsmen fight against him, he can even deprive the opponent of the control of the law of the sword, so that the opponent cannot exert powerful sword skills, and he can easily defeat the opponent.

At this time, Ye Tian condensed the origin of the law of the sword, and he could create his own law of the sword, and he could also control the law of the sword between heaven and earth to the greatest extent.

In front of him, the other swordsmen were all younger brothers.

"I feel it, it won't be long before I can create the strongest peak-level sword path master, and my strength will increase dramatically!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, Ye Tian practiced hard, trying to create a pinnacle-level sword path mastery, with the assistance of the origin of the law of the sword, Ye Tian had a flash of inspiration almost all the time, there was no bottleneck at all, the Tianyue knife was perfected at an incredible speed, and the speed of progress was rapid.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully perfect the Heavenly Moon Sword Peerless Technique to the level of the strongest peak-level Sword Dao Peerless Technique, and his power had increased by at least several times.

"The Tianyue Knife has been perfected to the level of the strongest peak-level sword path mastery, and there is no way to continue to improve it for the time being, and then there is the strongest level sword path mastery, and I don't know anything about the strongest level sword path mastery, and it is too difficult to create a strong sword path mastery. "

Ye Tian was not ready to continue to create the Dao of the Sword for the time being, he was ready to cultivate the Great Divine Power of the Space, the Spear of the Hell Divine Sky.

He obtained the Space Source Fragment, and with the help of the Space Source Fragment and an Empty Heavenly Dao Text, he had a great hope of successfully cultivating the Hell Divine Sky Spear.

Once he mastered a space supernatural power, his strength would not rise in general, but soar.

At that time, even if he can't become the son of the era, he will definitely become the most powerful Supreme Highness.

Ye Tian took out the Space Source Fragment, and immediately began to absorb the Refining Source Fragment, and mobilized the Void Heaven Dao Text in his soul to completely refine it.

Only in this way could Ye Tiancai truly use the Void Heaven Dao Text and the Spatial Source Fragments to cultivate the Hellish Divine Sky Spear, a great spatial supernatural power.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian slowly finished refining the Void Heavenly Dao text and the fragments of the space source, and the whole person seemed to be in the source of the space law, feeling the omnipresent space law.

"Start cultivating the Hell Divine Sky Spear, I hope you can succeed in cultivating!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Hell Divine Sky Spear is a space great divine power, and usually if you want to cultivate this great divine power, you can't cultivate it at all, but at this moment, under the empty heavenly dao text and the space source fragments, Ye Tian is full of advanced space laws and space origins, forcibly comprehending the Hell Divine Sky Spear little by little, and began to slowly cultivate a trace of fur.

"The fur is also the beginning, proving that I can cultivate the Hell Divine Sky Spear, the Void Heavenly Dao text and the space source fragments are enough to support me in this state for a long time, and I should be able to cultivate the Hell Divine Sky Spear, a space divine power, to the entry realm. "

Ye Tian thought.

Therefore, Ye Tian continued to cultivate and comprehend, without wasting a little time.

In the blink of an eye, two years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian opened his eyes, and his eyes gradually condensed into a dark spear, exuding the aura of the law of space, incomparably sharp and sharp.

"The Spear of the Hell Divine Sky, it's done!"

Immediately.

Ye Tian entered a battle room in the cultivation tower, this was a separate battle room that he had asked the Dark Lord to set up, and the things here were extremely strong, enough to support his battles and experiments.

At this time.

In the cultivation room, there is a huge stone statue, which is made of the very strong black steel stone in the universe, and even a great god-level attack can hardly destroy this stone statue.

Looking at this stone statue, Ye Tian's heart moved, and he launched the Spear of Hell Divine Void.

"Medium!"

The Hell's Divine Sky Spear stabbed the stone statue at an extremely fast speed, and in the blink of an eye, the stone statue turned into countless fragments, and then the countless fragments began to turn into powder.

"What a terrifying power, worthy of the great power of space, if it hits the enemy, even if that person has immortal talent, it is completely useless, in an instant, the power of space will shatter the opponent's countless cells, the flesh will turn into powder, the vitality will be extinct, and the immortal talent is useless!"

Ye Tian said.

With the cultivation of the Hell Divine Sky Spear, coupled with the strongest peak-level sword path mastery, Ye Tian's current strength is much stronger than before, but he still feels that he has not reached the level of the son of the era.

"Son of the Era, what a terrifying demon he is, I have become such a terrifying god now, and I still haven't reached the Son of the Era, so how can I become the Son of the Age?"

Ye Tian frowned and pondered.

It is impossible for him to stay at the god level for too long, is it possible that he can't become the son of the era at the god level?

"By the way, there is also a life-level exercise-Tianyuan True Method!"

Ye Tian thought.

The Tianyuan True Method can improve the level of life, and the benefits of raising the level of life are many, not only the life span is increased many times, but more importantly, the limit of the body will also be increased a lot.

For example, a person's strength is 100, and after reaching 100, he has reached the limit of this realm, but once the life level is raised, the limit of 100 will be increased to 120 or even more, so that he can continue to improve his strength without breaking through the realm.

For example, Ye Tian has now almost raised his immortal power, immortal soul and immortal body to the limit at the god level, and it is difficult to continue to improve, but if he continues to raise his life level by one level, he can continue to improve his immortal power, immortal soul and immortal body.

In addition, the Immortal Normalization Technique that Ye Tian had cultivated before was incomplete, so there was no effect of raising the limit, only the effect of simply increasing lifespan.

Therefore, Ye Tian only needed to change the Tianyuan True Law now, and he could cultivate the Tianyuan True Law to the third layer in a short period of time and stabilize his third-order life level.

"Start cultivating the Tianyuan True Method!"

Ye Tian decided.

Immediately, he began to comprehend the first layer of the Heavenly Yuan True Method.

With Ye Tian's comprehension, it didn't take long to comprehend the first layer of the Tianyuan True Method, and then began to cultivate the first layer of the Tianyuan True Method.

The first layer of the Tian Yuan True Law has no special effect, it is just the foundation, the first order of life has cultivated the first layer of the Tian Yuan True Law is still a first-order life, but it has increased some lifespan accordingly, but this is the foundation, and it has to be cultivated, and it is also to create a foundation for the later Tian Yuan True Law.

It took a few days for Ye Tian to successfully cultivate the first layer of the Tianyuan True Method, and he immediately began to comprehend the second and third layers of the Tianyuan True Method.

Flash.

Five years have passed.

Using these five years, Ye Tian successfully cultivated the Tianyuan True Law to the third-order realm, allowing him to have the most perfect third-order life level, unlike before, although it was also a third-order life level, it had flaws.

After becoming a perfect third-order life, Ye Tian felt like a bottle that was not filled with water and could continue to fill it.

He is far from reaching the limit of the god level at present, and he can continue to cultivate and improve his cultivation.
